title: Final review of Phase 4 epic diff
description: Meta-work tick per the planning-time convention (claude-runner.md, Meta-work ticks). Review the full phase 4 diff before close-out: correctness of query.Roadmap consumer semantics across all three surfaces (CLI/TUI/board agree on status meanings), JSON additivity, UI accessibility + CLAUDE.md compliance (pnpm, ticks-* components, Catppuccin), perf on hot paths, drift. Dispatch a reviewer subagent (the diff spans Go + TypeScript); route findings back to implementers and merge fixes before unblocking close-out.
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer findings resolved or explicitly accepted; go test ./... and ui pnpm test green on the final tree
